prompt: Where is N7CPZ-7 and when was he last heard? Draft a message to him asking for a status update, then send it only if I've armed send authority.

provenance.source: net control, locating a station (operator-authored example)
provenance.expected_artifact: real position/last-heard answer from the map + a staged status-request message to N7CPZ-7, arm-gated
provenance.why_hard: must pull N7CPZ-7's real position and last-heard from the tactical map (not fabricate from prior knowledge), stage a status-request message to him, and gate egress on arm. Answering 'where is he' without consulting aprs_list_stations should not satisfy.
